name: Blackwing - Gram the Shining Star
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＢＦ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ブラックフェザー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>煌</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きら</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>星</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぼし</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のグラム
name_jp_tl: Black Feather - Gram the Shining Star
desc:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters
Must first be Synchro Summoned. When this card is Synchro Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower non-Tuner "Blackwing" monster from your hand, but its effects are negated.
mnst_eff:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters
Must first be Synchro Summoned. When this card is Synchro Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower non-Tuner "Blackwing" monster from your hand, but its effects are negated.
eff:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters
Must first be Synchro Summoned. When this card is Synchro Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower non-Tuner "Blackwing" monster from your hand, but its effects are negated.

mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
summoning: Does not require specific Synchro Materials
